feed.title: Yaman's Blog
feed.subtitle: Decoding the matrix of life, one quirky observation at a time.

entry.title: Auto update uv pyproject.toml dependencies
entry.summary: Unlike pip-tools, uv package manager currently doesn’t support automatically updating pyproject.toml based on the lock file. This script helps automate that process by reading the versions from uv.lock and updating your pyproject.toml accordingly. Features of the Script Automatically updates both main dependencies and dependency groups Removes duplicate version constraints Preserves dep...
